title: Intermittent Connectivity in Segmented Network
summary: Users in the Operations VLAN intermittently lose access to a cloud portal. DNS lookups sometimes fail during peak usage windows.
context: 200-user enterprise with Admin, Operations, IT, and Guest VLANs. A cloud-hosted portal is accessed over the internet through an edge firewall.

artifacts.label: Ping from OPS-01 to Cloud Portal
artifacts.summary: RTT is stable early, then degrades with intermittent loss beginning around 09:10.
